author: Aubert, Bernard and others
title: A Search for the rare decay $B^{0}\\to\\tau^{+}\\tau^{-}$ at BABAR
abstract: We present the results of a search for the decay $B^{0}\\to\\tau^{+}\\tau^{-}$ in a data sample of $(232\\pm 3)\\times 10^{6}$ $\\Upsilon(4S)\\to B\\bar{B}$ decays using the BABAR detector. Certain extensions of the Standard Model predict an enhanced rate for this decay. We reconstruct one $B$ meson in a hadronic decay mode and search for the decay of the other $B$ meson to $\\tau^{+}\\tau^{-}$. No evidence for an excess of signal events is found. We set an upper limit on the branching fraction of $\\mathcal{B}(B^{0}\\to\\tau^{+}\\tau^{-})<4.1\\times 10^{-3}$ at the 90% confidence level.
